nasb.text: “There is none like the God of Jeshurun, Who rides the heavens to your help, And through the skies in His majesty.

esv.text: “There is none like God, O Jeshurun, who rides through the heavens to your help, through the skies in his majesty.

cnv.text: 沒有人像耶書崙的　神， 為了幫助你，他乘駕諸天， 在他的威嚴中，他騰空行雲。

ccb.text: “耶书仑啊， 上帝无与伦比， 祂驰骋诸天，前来助你， 穿越长空，充满威严。
